accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text; the description of the CRA process and the GAO letter are accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; the statement about Senate passage requiring presidential signature is accurate real-world context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution uses CRA to overturn the DOE student loan waiver rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Explains the rule shall have no force or effect, which is the operative legal change.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this simple disapproval resolution.

effective_dates.why: Notes the resolution has no separate effective date beyond its enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the CRA mechanism, the targeted rule, the GAO letter, and the operative nullification language.

concise.why: Thorough without padding; length is appropriate to the detail provided.

correct_entities.why: Department of Education, GAO, Congressional Review Act all correctly named.

correct_figures.why: 87 Fed. Reg. 61512, Oct. 12, 2022, March 17 and 22, 2023 dates, pages S903-S906 all correct.
